evals.name: basic-setup
evals.prompt: I have an AstroDB database at .claude/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/astrodb-template.sqlite. I want to see the data in a web interface.
evals.expected_output: The model should clone the Astro-Web repository, verify the database schema using sqlite3, run the setup_website.py script with the discovered ra_deg and dec_deg columns, and provide instructions to start the server.

evals.name: custom-columns
evals.prompt: Please set up the AstroDB website for the database at .claude/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/astrodb-template.sqlite. I know the RA column is ra_deg and Dec is dec_deg. The primary table is Sources.
evals.expected_output: The model should clone the repository, run the setup_website.py script using the provided ra_deg, dec_deg, and Sources table arguments, and explain how to start the website.
